title: Showing the mirror column group color
excerpt:
Im looking for my mirror column to be the color of the group its in on the source board. However it seems like all Mirror lables are blue. Is this right?? 
Also don’t see a way to use the conditional coloring of the whol…

posts.author: zkendall (Zack Kendall)
posts.cookedHtml:
Im looking for my mirror column to be the color of the group its in on the source board. However it seems like all Mirror lables are blue. Is this right??

Also don’t see a way to use the conditional coloring of the whole cell. Thats correct right?

Am i missing something?

Context: The whole idea is for the employee to be able to see that client is either currently active or inactive. Which means I was hoping once they clicked and added “Chicken Valley LLC” to the label would be green because on the client board active group is green.

Frame 20813544×2420 479 KB

posts.author: BruceGosk (Bruce Gosk)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Zack, this would be a decent feature request I believe.
